wiki.summary: On “She Knows Too Much,” Mac fantasizes about a woman who he feels is out of his league. As time goes on, Mac realizes that this seemingly perfect woman is actually just a gold digger with many lacking qualities. The song initially leaked online on February 6, 2020, and was officially released six years later as a single from Thundercat’s fifth studio album, Distracted. “What can I say about Mac Miller that hasn’t been said, shared & explored with you all. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: On “She Knows Too Much,” Mac fantasizes about a woman who he feels is out of his league. As time goes on, Mac realizes that this seemingly perfect woman is actually just a gold digger with many lacking qualities. The song initially leaked online on February 6, 2020, and was officially released six years later as a single from Thundercat’s fifth studio album, Distracted. “What can I say about Mac Miller that hasn’t been said, shared & explored with you all. I always considered Mac a “one man rat pack”. Smooth like Frank, cool like Sammy, suave like Dean. I wish that you all could have been there with us the moment this song was created in his garage. Between Mac Miller, Taylor Graves, Josh Berg & I we all knew it was something special. So happy to be able to finally share! From Faces, to Swimming in Circles, to Balloonerism and beyond…long live Mac Miller!!!“ — via Instagram Read more on Last.fm.
